topic: Michael Horn on the Billy Meyer case
topicBrief: Michael Horn is a longtime researcher and advocate associated with the Billy Meier UFO/contactee case. He has produced documentaries, studied Meier's contact reports, visited Meier in Switzerland, and argues that the case contains evidence worth examining. The case is controversial in UFO circles; many listeners may know it through the I Want to Believe X-Files poster image attributed to a Meier photo.
questionBank: Ask who Billy Meier is and why the case matters.
Ask what evidence Horn considers strongest.
Ask how Horn separates contested photos from contact reports and corroborated information.
Ask what a skeptical listener should examine first.
